zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr於1199年出生在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，他的父親Richard de Lyons25歲，母親Maud21歲。他於1217年之前與Maud of Warkworth在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年在英國諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年51歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr于1199年出生在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯时，他的父亲Richard de Lyons25岁，母亲Maud21岁。他于1217年之前与Maud of Warkworth在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年在英国諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年51岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lyons,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for Ó Laighin (see Lyne , Lane , Lyon ) or Ó Liatháin (see Lehane ).

variants.name: Lyon
meanings: Scottish, English, and French: from the personal name Middle English Lyon, Old French Leon (from Latin leo ‘lion’, or the cognate Greek leōn; see Leon ). Compare Lyall .
Scottish and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lyons-la-Forêt in Eure, Normandy. It is unlikely to be from the better-known southern French city of Lyon (see 5 below).

English and French: nickname from Middle English lioun ‘lion’ (Old English, Latin leo), Old French leon, perhaps applied to a brave, fierce, or proud person, or one with a shaggy mane of hair. Compare Lion .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr was born in 1199, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, his father, Richard de Lyons, was 25 and his mother, Maud, was 21. He married Maud of Warkworth before 1217, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1250, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr est né en 1199, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lyons, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Maud of Warkworth avant 1217, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1250, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr 1199 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lyons 25 und seine Mutter Maud 21. Er hat vor 1217 in England Maud of Warkworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr è nato il nel 1199 nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Richard de Lyons, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maud, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Maud of Warkworth prima del 1217, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1250, nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lyons, Snrが1199年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard de Lyonsは25歳，母Maudは21歳であった。1217年以前にイギリスでMaud of Warkworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで51歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr(이)가 1199년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lyons(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1217년 이전 영국에서 Maud of Warkworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr nasceu em 1199, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Lyons, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud of Warkworth antes 1217, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr родился в 1199 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Lyons было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud of Warkworth перед 1217 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger de Lyons, Snr nació en 1199, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Lyons, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maud, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Maud of Warkworth antes de 1217, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1250, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
